subject: ACTION: rebuild cu124 with start.sh CUBRIC_EPHEMERAL fix (MPI-78 needs image; no version bump — reuse v0.4.6)
body:
UPDATE: MPI-78 scope grew — it now NEEDS an image change. Live verify found the ephemeral disk-size control is a no-op without it.

WHAT WE FOUND (live, L4 Any-region Pod, v0.4.6-cu124): models install fine but land on RunPod's DEFAULT ~20GB Pod volume at /workspace, NOT the user's chosen container disk. Telemetry: container Disk 31MB/60GB (empty), Volume 7GB/20GB (the model). Root cause: RunPod auto-mounts a ~20GB default volume at /workspace on EVERY Pod even with no networkVolumeId, and start.sh hardcodes all model/cache/node paths to /workspace. So ephemeral mode is silently capped at 20GB and the user's disk size is ignored. Omitting volumeMountPath app-side did nothing (RunPod attaches the default regardless).

THE FIX (already written — it's in the IMAGE, your domain):
  * mpi-ci/cubric-vision-pod/start.sh: added a CUBRIC_ROOT switch. When env CUBRIC_EPHEMERAL=1, CUBRIC_ROOT=/cubric-data (a dir on the CONTAINER disk) instead of /workspace; ALL paths (COMFY_MODELS/OUTPUT/CACHE/CUSTOM_NODES/PYLIBS/TRITON + extra_model_paths.yaml base_path) now root on $CUBRIC_ROOT. Also added exports CUBRIC_MODELS_DIR + CUBRIC_MANIFEST_PATH so the wrapper's install target follows the root (wrapper.py already reads those env vars; start.sh just wasn't exporting MODELS_DIR). Normal /workspace path is byte-identical (same values) — zero risk to the volume flow.
  * bash -n clean. Diff is start.sh only; wrapper.py unchanged (it already honors the env).

APP SIDE (mine, done, no rebuild): routes/remoteProxy.js now sends env CUBRIC_EPHEMERAL='1' on ephemeral GPU Pods. node --check clean.

ASK: please REDO the cu124 build with this start.sh change. Per Fabio: NO version bump needed — you haven't shipped cu128 or the cpu image yet and you're still on cu124 pre-verify, so reuse the v0.4.6 tag, just rebuild cu124 with the updated start.sh. (cu128 + cpu will pick it up whenever you build them.) start.sh is shared by all three images; the CUBRIC_EPHEMERAL branch is inert unless the app sets the env, so it won't affect volume-backed or CPU-download Pods.

You own the image + the commit. start.sh is in the mpi-ci repo (your repo), so it's cleanly yours — no shared-file overlap there. Ping when cu124 is rebuilt and I'll re-verify the Any-region telemetry (expect: Disk usage climbs with the model, the 20GB default volume sits unused).

recent_events.note: cu124 rebuilt with start.sh fix, run 27627514827, same v0.4.6 tag
